# BEYONDVYU — Turn happy customers into authentic Google reviews

> BEYONDVYU helps local businesses collect more authentic Google reviews with QR codes and an AI assistant that jogs your customers' memory — fully compliant with Google and FTC policy.

## Pricing

### Free Plan
- Price: Free
- Includes: QR code generation, basic analytics, up to 50 feedback submissions/month

### Starter Plan
- Price: ₹4,999/month
- All Free features, unlimited feedback, AI sentiment analysis, WhatsApp reports, custom branding

### Growth Plan (Most Popular)
- Price: ₹9,999/month
- All Starter features, multi-location support, priority support, advanced AI insights

## Product Description
BEYONDVYU is a SaaS platform for local businesses to collect authentic Google reviews. Key features:
- QR code-based review collection
- AI-powered sentiment analysis
- WhatsApp/email review request templates
- Weekly automated insights delivery
- FTC and Google policy compliant
- No review gating — all customers see same Google review link

## Compliance
- No incentivized reviews
- No writing reviews on behalf of customers
- No review gating
- Full FTC endorsement guidelines compliance
- Google review policy compliance
- RBI e-Mandate compliant for Indian subscriptions
